evidence.summary: Top-level API router sends /api/sessions to the sessions handler, diverts /api/sessions/:id/chat to conversations, and exposes /api/workflows/templates through the workflow template handler.
Session API owns workflow session lifecycle routes under /api/sessions/:id/workflow, initializes workflow services, persists transitions, and exposes workflow state/report reads.
Workflow template API supports listing, detail, validation, create/update/delete, duplicate, import preview/commit, export, and authoring operations while separating builtin and user sources.
Final report construction derives completed phase summaries, verification status, artifact refs, model fallback history, and template identity from completed workflow state.

Workflow report store keeps reports under ~/.claude/cc-jiangxia/workflow-sessions/<sessionId>/reports/final.json, validates pointer scope, treats missing/corrupt reports as recoverable reads, and only creates reports from completed workflow state.

Runtime service tests define the workflow transition contract: model fallback, prompt assembly with phase guardrails, pending confirmation, stale-state rejection, idempotent transitions, and final report pointer emission on final confirmation.

Report store tests verify immutable final report pointers, idempotent create behavior, preservation of unknown fields, rejection of unsafe artifact pointers, and non-mutation of protected user-owned files.
quotes_or_symbols: writes final reports before exposing a safe immutable report pointer
does not mutate protected user-owned files

evidence.summary: Final report tests confirm completed workflow state becomes a persisted report with completion summaries, accepted artifact refs, and recorded model fallback metadata.

API contract tests cover builtin/user template listing, readonly builtin semantics, validation errors, authoring operations, duplication, import preview/commit conflict rules, export payloads, and stable METHOD_NOT_ALLOWED / invalid JSON errors.

Sessions API tests enumerate workflow error codes and validate session-scoped workflow behavior including creation metadata, linked workflow start, state projection, transition flows, report availability, and workflow fixture-backed state persistence.

observations.summary: Workflow HTTP entry points are split between session-scoped state/report routes in src/server/api/sessions.ts and global template management routes in src/server/api/workflowTemplates.ts.
The router treats workflow templates as a top-level /api/workflows/templates surface, while workflow execution stays nested under /api/sessions/:id/workflow/*.

Final report persistence is explicitly gated by completed workflow state and immutable session-scoped artifact pointers; corrupt or missing reports are surfaced as recoverable read states instead of silent regeneration.
WorkflowRuntimeService behavior was inferred from its contract tests because the packet assigned the runtime test file but not the implementation file itself.
Most other assigned server test files in this packet were not on the traced workflow execution path and are therefore accounted for as inventory-only rather than graph evidence.
